content: Self-Refine’s single-model iterative output refinement and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-augmented self-reflection for autonomous agents can be combined into a new persistent self-improving framework where lightweight, repeated Self-Refine cycles incrementally populate Reflexion’s dynamic memory with domain-specific self-feedback rules, rather than requiring memory to be populated from scratch for each new task. This combined framework retains the key advantage of both methods: no additional supervised training or fine-tuning is required at any stage.
